title: agaloma corollata
intro: Agaloma corollata, also known as Agarista corollata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agaloma corollata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Agaloma corollata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
